resources.string: The most powerful data recovery tool for Android. Recover photos, videos, files, messages, and more.
© 2025 Ultimate Recovery Pro. All rights reserved.
Recover your lost data in seconds
No recent scans yet. Start your first scan!
Stop writing new data to increase recovery chances
Use Quick Scan for recently deleted files
Use Deep Scan for older or overwritten files
Choose a scan type to find your lost files
Scans for recently deleted files. Fast but limited in depth.
Thoroughly scans the entire storage. Takes longer but finds more files.
Scan specific file types or locations.
Try a deep scan or scan a different location
Could not access storage. Please grant permissions.
Recover deleted photos from your device
Recover deleted videos from your device
Recover deleted documents and other files
Root access required for some app data
Account recovery requires root access on most devices
Protect your data with regular backups
Protect your backup with a password
Are you sure you want to delete this backup?
Are you sure you want to restore this backup? Current data may be overwritten.
Files you deleted are moved here first
Are you sure you want to permanently delete all items? This action cannot be undone.
Permanently delete this file? This cannot be undone.
Browse and manage files on your device
Require authentication to open the app
Save recovered files to their original location when possible
Overwrite files that already exist at the recovery location
Move deleted files to recycle bin instead of permanent deletion
Disable battery optimization for reliable background scanning
Automatically scan for deleted files on app start
Clear all cached scan results and temporary files
Clear all cached data? This will also remove scan results.
Reset all settings to default values?
PIN must be at least 4 digits
Use your fingerprint or face to unlock
Biometric authentication not available on this device
No biometric credentials enrolled. Set up a fingerprint or face unlock first.
Too many failed attempts. Try again in %1$s.
Reset app data to remove the lock. All app settings will be reset.
Preview not available for this file type
The most comprehensive data recovery solution for Android devices. Recover photos, videos, documents, messages, and more with advanced scanning algorithms.
Check out Ultimate Recovery Pro — the best data recovery app for Android! %1$s
You are using the latest version
Ultimate Recovery Pro needs the following permissions to work properly
Required to scan and recover deleted files from your device storage
Required on Android 11+ to access all files for recovery
Required to recover deleted text messages
Required to recover deleted call history
Required to match recovered data with contacts
Required to identify your device for optimized recovery
Required to show scan and recovery progress notifications
Without this permission, %1$s feature will not work properly
Are you sure you want to delete the selected items? This action cannot be undone.
Restore selected items to their original location?
A file with this name already exists. Do you want to overwrite it?
No recoverable files were found. Try a deep scan for better results.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
Not enough storage space. Free up some space and try again.
The storage is read-only. Cannot write recovered files.
Permission denied. Please grant the required permissions.
Root access is required for this operation
If you enjoy using our app, would you mind taking a moment to rate it? It won\'t take more than a minute. Thanks for your support!
Something went wrong. Please try again.
Storage is full. Free up space and try again.
Recycle Bin is using %1$s of space
The most powerful data recovery tool for your Android device
Our advanced algorithms find files that other recovery tools miss
Recover photos, videos, documents, SMS, call logs, and more
Your data stays on your device. We never upload your files
Schedule automatic backups to prevent future data loss
No app available to open this file
This app needs storage permissions to scan and recover deleted files.
Use your fingerprint or face to continue
Too many wrong attempts. Please wait.
Are you sure you want to cancel the scan? Results found so far will be saved.
Are you sure you want to clear all recovery history? This cannot be undone.
Are you sure you want to delete this backup? This cannot be undone.
Are you sure you want to delete this file? This cannot be undone.
This file will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
Are you sure you want to permanently delete the selected items?
PIN must be at least 4 digits
Root access is available. Enable it for deep scan features.
Root access granted. Deep scan and raw recovery are now available.
Recover your lost data in seconds
Select a category to view files
